posts.text: By 2029 Germany’s defence budget is expected to swell to reach double that of France. This prospect is “the elephant in the room”, says one French military official https://www.economist.com/europe/2026/06/03/why-france-is-uneasy-about-german-rearmament?taid=6a22b592a7e6970001d493b0&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
If the KOSPI drops to levels last seen a few weeks ago, their entire financial system will fail, and they’ll probably need an IMF bailout. 

Governments used to try and avoid bubbles because of the consequences. Now, governments just blow bigger bubbles to bail out the prior ones…
posts.author: hkuppy
